name: Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited
summary: Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited, a business and technology services company, provides service oriented architecture-based enterprise transformation and integration solutions, and services in India, the United States, Qatar, and the Philippines. The company offers artificial intelligence (AI) services, including AI advisory, AI solutions, and AI as a Service; and big data services, such as data potential, warehouse, analytics and visualization, and value services. It also provides cloud services comprising cloud strategy, transformation and migration, and Software as a Service, as well as managed services; and application services that include application development, migration and transformation, management, application testing, and enterprise mobility. In addition, the company offers DevOps services, which comprise DevOps advisory, implementation, and support; and identity access and management (IAM) consulting solutions, including IAM strategy, implementation, and managed services. Further, it provides infrastructure management services, such as IaaS and PaaS solutions, database and middleware management services, and operating system management. The company serves the midsize market enterprises and the midsize units of Global 2000 enterprises across a range of industries. Cambridge Technology Enterprises Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
